member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.AuditEventEndpoints
member.summary: Registers AuditLog Minimal API endpoints.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.AuditEventEndpoints.MapAuditEventEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps all audit event endpoints to the provided route builder.
member.param: The endpoint route builder to register routes on.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.ReHashRequest
member.summary: Request body for the POST /api/audit-events/re-hash endpoint.
member.param: The tenant whose audit chain to analyse.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.ReHashRequest.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Request body for the POST /api/audit-events/re-hash endpoint.
member.param: The tenant whose audit chain to analyse.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.ReHashRequest.TenantId
member.summary: The tenant whose audit chain to analyse.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.ReHashRequest.TargetAlgorithm
member.summary: The target algorithm name (e.g. "SHA3_256").

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.AuthEndpoints
member.summary: Registers authentication-related Minimal API endpoints (logout).
member.remarks: Refresh token rotation is no longer handled here — Keycloak manages token lifecycle. The JWKS endpoint has been removed; JWT validation keys are fetched automatically from the Keycloak authority's /.well-known/openid-configuration discovery document.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.AuthEndpoints.MapAuthEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps all auth endpoints to the provided route builder.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.RefreshRequest
member.summary: Request body for refresh and logout endpoints.
member.param: The raw 43-character Base64Url opaque refresh token.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.RefreshRequest.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Request body for refresh and logout endpoints.
member.param: The raw 43-character Base64Url opaque refresh token.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.RefreshRequest.RefreshToken
member.summary: The raw 43-character Base64Url opaque refresh token.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.DashboardEndpoints
member.summary: Registers Dashboard-related Minimal API endpoints.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.DashboardEndpoints.MapDashboardEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps the dashboard stats GET endpoint to the provided route builder.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.FacilityEndpoints
member.summary: Registers Facility-related Minimal API endpoints (reads and writes), including nested sub-resource routes.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.FacilityEndpoints.MapFacilityEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps all Facility GET and write endpoints to the provided route builder.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.FacilityEndpoints.ResolveTenantIdAsync(SpaceOS.Kernel.Domain.Auth.ITenantResolver,SpaceOS.Kernel.Domain.Repositories.IFacilityRepository,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves the tenant ID from the JWT tid claim. When the claim is absent (e.g. dev tokens), falls back to the owning facility's tenant.

member.summary: Request body for registering a new WorkStation under a Facility.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.RegisterSpaceLayerRequest
member.summary: Request body for registering a new SpaceLayer under a Facility.
member.param: The construction trade this layer represents.
URL of the external source (required when federated).
Local intent data JSON (used when not federated).

member.summary: The construction trade this layer represents.

member.summary: URL of the external source (required when federated).

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.UpdateSpaceLayerIntentRequest
member.summary: Request body for updating a SpaceLayer's local intent data.
member.param: The new intent data JSON string.
Optional trade type used to select the per-trade structural JSON schema for validation. When omitted, generic rules apply (max depth 10, max 64 KB, must be an object or array).

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.UpdateSpaceLayerIntentRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{SpaceOS.Kernel.Domain.Enums.TradeType})
member.summary: Request body for updating a SpaceLayer's local intent data.
member.param: The new intent data JSON string.
Optional trade type used to select the per-trade structural JSON schema for validation. When omitted, generic rules apply (max depth 10, max 64 KB, must be an object or array).

member.summary: The new intent data JSON string.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.UpdateSpaceLayerIntentRequest.TradeType
member.summary: Optional trade type used to select the per-trade structural JSON schema for validation. When omitted, generic rules apply (max depth 10, max 64 KB, must be an object or array).

member.summary: Request body for updating a Tenant's enabled modules.
member.param: The new set of enabled module names (e.g. ["door", "cutting"]).

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.UpdateTenantModulesRequest.Modules

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.ToolEndpoints
member.summary: Minimal API endpoints for the LLM Tool Registry. All endpoints require authentication and source TenantId from the JWT claim.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.ToolEndpoints.MapToolEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps tool registry query endpoints to the application.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.ToolEndpoints.GetTenantId(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal)
member.summary: Resolves the current tenant GUID from JWT claims. Priority: (1) Keycloak spaceos_tenants claims — ASP.NET JsonWebTokenHandler splits JSON array elements into individual objects with the same name, so each claim value is a single JSON object like {"tenant_id":"..."}; (2) legacy flat tid claim — note: when MapInboundClaims = true (default) the JWT handler remaps "tid" → URI, so both names are checked; (3) tenant_id flat claim. Returns when no tenant claim is present.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Endpoints.WorkStationEndpoints
member.summary: Registers WorkStation-related Minimal API endpoints (reads and writes).

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Extensions.ResultExtensions
member.summary: Maps and values from the Application layer to ASP.NET Core responses.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Extensions.ResultExtensions.ToApiResult``1(Ardalis.Result.Result{``0})
member.summary: Converts a to the appropriate HTTP response.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Extensions.ResultExtensions.ToApiResult(Ardalis.Result.Result)
member.summary: Converts a non-generic to the appropriate HTTP response.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Extensions.ResultExtensions.ToCreatedResult``1(Ardalis.Result.Result{``0},System.String,System.Func{``0,System.Object})
member.summary: Converts a to a 201 Created response using a named route for the Location header. Returns 422 on validation failure and 500 on unexpected errors.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware
member.summary: Global exception-handling middleware. Catches unhandled exceptions and converts them to RFC 7807 Problem Details responses — no stack traces ever leave the process.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware})
member.summary: Initialises the middleware with the next delegate and a logger.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Invokes the middleware, forwarding to the next delegate and catching any unhandled exceptions.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Middleware.RequestBodySizeLimitFilter
member.summary: Endpoint filter that rejects requests whose Content-Length header exceeds 64 KB. This enforces the same limit as the Kestrel MaxRequestBodySize setting so that integration tests (which use and therefore bypass Kestrel) also receive a 413 response for oversized payloads.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Middleware.SipVersionMiddleware
member.summary: BE-06 — SpaceOS Inter-node Protocol (SIP) versioning middleware. Enforces the presence and value of the SpaceOS-SIP-Version header on all /api/sync/* and /api/nodes/* requests. Requests with a missing or unsupported version receive a 400 Problem Details response.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Middleware.SipVersionMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate)
member.summary: Initialises the middleware with the next delegate in the pipeline.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.Middleware.SipVersionMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Inspects the SIP version header for relevant paths and short-circuits with 400 on violation.
member.param: The HTTP context for the current request.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.OpenApi.EnumStringSchemaFilter
member.summary: Swashbuckle schema filter that converts enum schemas from type: integer to type: string with named values, matching the runtime behaviour.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Kernel.Api.OpenApi.PagedListSchemaFilter
member.summary: Ensures schemas are rendered with their full property set in Swagger UI. Without this filter Swashbuckle may collapse the generic type to object.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Exposes for in integration tests.
